catalysts.thesis: EVgo delivered a pivotal inflection quarter with record revenue (+75% YoY) and its first-time positive Adjusted EBITDA, yet the stock has only reacted mildly (+2-3%). The transition to profitability in the EV charging space is a major re-rating event that the market is currently under-pricing due to historical skepticism.
catalysts.catalyst_details: Q4 Earnings Report (March 3, 2026): Revenue of $118.5M beat estimates of $101.3M; achieved positive Adjusted EBITDA for the first time.
catalysts.absorption_status: Lagging Response: despite the 'record' beat and profitability milestone, shares are up <5%, offering a PEAD entry before the narrative shifts to profitable growth.
catalysts.risk: High capital expenditures and cash burn remain a concern for long-term holders.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Trading at ~1.5x sales despite 75% growth and achieving EBITDA profitability, significantly discounted vs. infrastructure peers.
